stitchHint: Merge the done scene drafts into one chapter
stitchNeedsDone: All scenes must be done to stitch
errNoChapterPlan: Decompose this chapter into scenes first.
errNoSceneDrafts: No completed scene drafts to stitch yet.
errScenesNotDone: Mark all scenes done before stitching.
noWork: No co-writer Work for this book yet.
markDoneHint: Mark this scene done — required before the chapter can be published
addChatModel: Add a model to start writing
readyToDraftHint: Grounding gets richer after you build a knowledge graph, but it is optional — you can write now.
cowriteBridgeHint: Hand this draft to the AI co-writer — needs only a chat model; knowledge is optional.
guidedCueReady: Write your opening, then Generate — or Continue from your cursor in the editor.
guidedCueStart: Create your first scene, then write your opening and Generate — or Continue from your cursor in the editor.

sel.too_long: Selection too long for AI tools.

inline.continueHint: Stream an AI continuation from your cursor.
inline.need_model: Set a default model in the co-writer Settings
inline.need_scene: Pick a scene in the co-writer panel first

beatsheet.title: Beat Sheet
beatsheet.empty: Pick a structure template to see its beats and your coverage.

scenegraph.title: Scene Graph
scenegraph.selectTwo: Click two scenes to link them ({{n}}/2)
scenegraph.label: label (optional)
scenegraph.linkExists: A link of that kind already exists between these scenes.
scenegraph.empty: No scenes yet — plan some scenes in the outline to see the graph.

whatif.altHint: Draft an alternate (preview) — not saved until you promote.
whatif.promotedPartial: Promoted, but {{n}} take(s) couldn’t be added.
whatif.promotedProsePartial: Promoted, but {{n}} take(s)’ prose couldn’t be saved — re-promote to retry.
whatif.promoteHint: Generate at least one take to promote

codex.title: Cast & Codex
codex.windowUnknown: Reading position unknown — state may be incomplete.
codex.noProject: No knowledge graph yet — extract this book to populate the codex.
codex.noMatch: No cast members match your search.
codex.empty: No extracted entities yet — publish/extract to populate the codex.
codex.archiveConfirm: Retire "{{name}}"? Its relations and glossary anchor are kept; it returns if the book mentions it again (there is no restore button).
codex.archived: Retired — it returns if the book mentions it again.
codex.truncated: Showing the first 200 — refine your search to narrow the list.

relations.title: Relationship Map
relations.noProject: No knowledge graph yet — extract this book to map relationships.
relations.noRelations: This entity has no relations yet.

chrono.title: Timeline
chrono.noProject: No knowledge graph yet — extract this book to build the timeline.
chrono.empty: No events yet — extract this book first.
chrono.range_error: Check the date range — the start must be on or before the end.

chararc.title: Character Arc
chararc.noProject: No knowledge graph yet — extract this book to chart character arcs.
chararc.empty: This character has no events yet.

wmap.title: World Map
wmap.empty: No places yet — add one above, or extract this book to discover locations.
wmap.noProject: No knowledge graph yet — extract this book to populate places.
wmap.linkMissing: One of those places no longer exists.
wmap.deleteConfirm: Remove “{{name}}” from the world map? This archives the place.

styleVoice.scopeHint: Most specific scope wins (scene › chapter › book). A mid value is balanced — no steer.

flywheelPanel.empty: Publish a chapter to grow your canon — new entities, relations and events will show up here.
flywheelPanel.subtitle: Your latest publish grew the canon:

referencesPanel.title: Title
referencesPanel.author: Author
referencesPanel.pickEmbedModel: Embedding model (set once for this work)
referencesPanel.noEmbedModel: Add an embedding model (e.g. bge-m3) in AI settings to enable reference retrieval.
referencesPanel.empty: No references yet — add influences above.

workSettings.defaultModelHint: Used as the starting model for this book. A stronger model is the biggest prose-quality lever.
workSettings.assemblyModeHint: chapter = one coherent pass per chapter (better long-form continuity); per_scene = granular scene-by-scene.
workSettings.narrativeThreadHint: Advisory: detects open promises and re-injects them so generation honors/pays them; surfaces unpaid promises as a debt view. Opt-in.
workSettings.saveError: Could not save settings — try again.

statsIntro: Your corrections are the quality signal. Lower edit/regenerate/reject (and higher accept) in Diverge means the K-option reranker is earning its time.
statsColdStart: No generations yet — compose a few scenes and your accept/edit/regenerate rates will appear here.

correction.capturedToast: Noted — your co-writer will learn from this

reasoningHint: Auto = the server decides per model. Off disables thinking; Low/Med/High force it.
divergeHint: Generate several options and pick, edit, or regenerate the best (non-streaming).
criticPanelEmpty: No verdict yet — generate a scene (or re-check the current draft) to see the continuity critic.
overrideSlipBlocked: Accept blocked: a dị bản override slipped back to the canon value. Regenerate before accepting.
overrideSlipExhausted: Override still slipping after the regeneration cap — surfaced for your review (accept is no longer blocked).
groundingEmptyHint: No knowledge graph yet — run a knowledge extraction on this book once to ground the co-writer. After that, publishing chapters keeps the canon up to date automatically.
rulePlaceholder: A canon rule the co-writer must respect…
canonUncheckedNoCast: no tracked characters in this scene
canonUncheckedNoPosition: this scene has no reading-order position yet
reviseGuide: Keep canon consistent: {{name}} is gone from the story by this scene — do not portray them as present or acting.

plan.premise: Premise — what is this arc about?
plan.replace_prompt: {{count}} chapter(s) already have scenes. Replace them with this plan?
plan.err_no_chapters: This book has no chapters yet — create chapters before planning.
plan.err_too_many_chapters: Too many chapters to plan at once.
plan.err_bad_entity: Some scene cast members are not in this book's glossary.
plan.err_bad_chapter: A chapter in the plan is not part of this book.

outline.title: Outline
outline.empty: No outline yet. Use the Planner (right panel) to decompose chapters into scenes.
outline.conflict: This node was edited elsewhere — refreshed.

corkboard.empty: No chapters yet. Plan chapters first, then add scene cards.
corkboard.emptyBand: No scenes in {{chapter}} — add a card.

adapt.hint: Rewrite the inherited source scene to honour this branch (a ghost you review and accept).
adapt.emptyHint: The source chapter has no prose to adapt — generate a fresh draft instead.

derive.launchHint: Spawn a what-if branching from this canon
derive.title: Spawn a what-if (derivative)
derive.step1Hint: Pick the chapter where your what-if branches from canon. Everything up to that chapter is inherited read-only; you write forward from there.
derive.branchFromStart: From the very start (no inherited canon)
derive.step2Hint: How does your version diverge? (You can still override any entity in the next step.)
derive.step3Hint: Override entity fields for your what-if. Anything you do NOT override is inherited from canon.
derive.overridePlaceholder: Override this entity (e.g. now a woman, now a villain)…
derive.unanchoredHint: This entity is not yet in the glossary — anchor it to override it here.
derive.noEntities: No canon entities yet — author overrides later in the studio.
derive.canonRulesPlaceholder: e.g. Magic no longer exists in this branch.
derive.name: What-if name
derive.namePlaceholder: e.g. Genderbend AU — 张若尘 as a woman
derive.bannerReadonly: Original chapters are a read-only reference — adapt them manually.
derive.noCanonEntities: No canon entities to inherit yet.
derive.referenceSpineHint: Original chapters up to your branch point — adapt them manually. They are not inserted into your draft.

promote.actionHint: Save this what-if as a persistent derivative with its own knowledge graph
promote.needsName: Name the what-if to promote it.

scope.label: Motif scope
scope.needsBook: Open a book to see its motifs

motif.overuse: "{{name}}" is already used in {{chapters}} — consider varying it.

list.truncated: Showing the first 100 — narrow with search or filters to see the rest.

permission.readOnly: This is a shared template — clone it to make your own editable copy.

empty.title: Your motif library is ready
empty.body: Motifs are reusable plot shapes. The planner picks one per chapter so even a small model writes a solid scene. 12 starter motifs are already here — tu-tiên and báo-thù.
empty.hint: No tokens needed — building a motif by hand is free.

create.title: New motif
create.name: Name
create.summary: Summary (this is what the planner matches on)

err.name: A name is required
err.save: Couldn't save — check the code isn't already used.

adopt.title: Adopt motif
adopt.body: Adopt makes your own private editable copy. Choose where it goes.
adopt.whatItDoes: Copy this motif into your library (a private, editable clone).

quota.adopt: You've adopted {{used}}/{{limit}} this period — archive some or wait.

binding.freeForm: No motif matched — this scene is free-form.
binding.noWork: Create a plan for this book to bind motifs to its scenes.

conf.title: Conformance
conf.rerunWhat: Re-check every scene in this chapter against its planned beat.
conf.empty: Not generated yet — generate scenes to see conformance.
conf.rerunNeedsModel: Pick a model to re-run conformance

arc.mobileNotice: The timeline grid is available on a larger screen — here you can edit it as a list.
arc.libraryEmpty: No arc templates yet. Create one, or import a story to deconstruct.

templates.createShare: Share with this book's collaborators (book tier)
templates.driftUnapplied: Not applied to this book yet — apply it above to compare drift.
templates.driftNoProvenance: This arc was authored directly — there is no template to drift from.
templates.driftGone: The source template is no longer available.
templates.driftClean: No drift — the realized arc matches its template.
templates.driftSummary: {{gaps}} coverage gap(s) · {{violations}} ordering issue(s) · {{folded}} folded placement(s)
templates.driftPacingOnly: Structure matches, but the pacing drifted (max {{drift}}).
templates.driftNoThreads: The template has no threads to compare.
templates.driftPacingNC: Not comparable yet — the template has no tension curve.
templates.truncated: Showing the first {{shown}} of {{count}} — use Catalog or a narrower tier to find more.

import.privacy: The raw text stays private to you and is never shared. Only the derived abstract structure can be published — and publishing strips the source reference.
import.noSources: No sources yet — paste one below.
import.deleteConfirm: Delete this source? There is no restore.
import.sourceError: Could not save the source — try again.
import.what: Deconstruct the reference into a reusable arc template (LLM-metered).
import.done: A new arc template was created — find it in the Library.

extract.blurb: Save this arc’s shape as a reusable template in your library.
extract.conflict: You already have a template with that name — rename it.
extract.error: Could not save this arc as a template.

suggest.noProject: Open a book with a Work to get arc suggestions for its premise.
suggest.premisePlaceholder: Describe the premise — e.g. "a reluctant heir must reclaim a fallen house"
suggest.empty: No arc templates fit yet — create one, or import a story to deconstruct.

decompile.confirm: Automatically group this book’s chapters into arcs (~{{n}} chapters each). Safe to re-run — existing arcs are reused.
decompile.error: Could not group the chapters into arcs.
decompile.none: No chapters to group into arcs yet.

graph.title: Graph — composed of · precedes · variant of
graph.error: Could not load the motif graph.
graph.truncated: Showing the first {{cap}} motifs — narrow by tier or search to see more.
graph.canvasEmpty: No motifs to graph yet — create or adopt motifs, then link them.

suggest.empty: No motif fits this scene yet — add more to your library.
suggest.degradedMine: Your motifs aren't ranked by fit — set up an embedding model in your settings to rank them semantically.
suggest.degradedLibrary: Not ranked by fit — the shared library's embedding model isn't configured, so these are genre fallbacks, not scored matches.

list.title: Runs for this book
list.blockedBanner: A run is already {{status}} for this book — only one active run per book is allowed. Open it below, or pause/close it first.
list.blockedTooltip: Pause or close the active run first.
list.empty: No autonomous authoring runs yet for this book.

newRun.title: New run — configure
newRun.planLabel: Plan (required — a run drafts an already-approved plan's beats)
newRun.planEmpty: No approved plan runs yet for this book.

gate.title: Gate check
gate.startBlocked: Fix the failing gate check(s) below first.

header.closedNote: Run closed — terminal, no further actions.
header.pollSuspended: Polling suspended — run is not active

queue.title: Unit queue
queue.hint: Click a chapter to read its draft below.

diff.title: Draft review
diff.notDrafted: Not drafted yet — nothing to review.
diff.notReached: Run halted before reaching this chapter.
diff.cascadeWarning: {{count}} downstream unit(s) already drafted/accepted ({{chapters}}) — this is advisory only; rejecting this unit does NOT auto-revert them.
diff.blockedReview: Accept/Reject blocked while the run is {{status}} — the backend only allows review once the run has stopped (report_ready / failed / paused). Pause the run to review this chapter now.
diff.keyboardHint: Keyboard: a=accept · r=reject · ←/→ or p/n = prev/next unit

revert.title: Revert all drafted/accepted units?
revert.body: This rejects every drafted/accepted unit in reverse order and restores each chapter to its pre-run revision. This cannot be undone from this UI. Affected:
revert.partialBody: Unit {{index}} failed to restore ({{error}}). {{count}} unit(s) reverted successfully before the stop; the run is left open (same state as before) so you can retry.
revert.successBody: All {{count}} unit(s) reverted; the run is now closed.

mission.empty: Open a run from the Runs list to see its mission control.
